en: Morning routine. Feed Yıldız, then head out.
tr: Sabah rutini. Önce Yıldız'ı besle, sonra çık.

en: Walk through Taşlıca and catch the dolmuş to the observatory.
tr: Taşlıca'dan geç, gözlemevine giden dolmuşa bin.

en: The tape is waiting. Get to the observatory.

tr: Hiçbir şeyi atlama. Bugün rutin önemli.

en: Get up to the dish before the window opens.
tr: Gözlem penceresi açılmadan çanağın başına çık.

en: Head out. The town feels different.
Be at the observatory for the call.
Dr. Reyes arrives today. Head out.
Take Dr. Reyes up to the dish.
Straight to the observatory. No detours.
Come down. The tea house is waiting.
Last shift. Go up one more time.
tr: Son vardiya. Bir kez daha yukarı çık.

en: Walk home. Let them say goodbye.
